name: one-horizon
description: Roadmap-first AI development for product teams. Send tasks, bugs, and initiatives to your coding agent, and keep every task, commit, and PR tied back to the roadmap.

interface.shortDescription: Plan from the roadmap. Let AI agents build it.
interface.longDescription: Turn tasks, bugs, and initiatives into agent-ready specs. One Horizon pulls planned work into Codex, writes progress back as you ship, and keeps every task, commit, and PR tied back to the roadmap.
defaultPrompt: I found a bug in checkout, fix and log it.
